channel.title: New Testament
channel.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
channel.itunes:summary: Personal feed for Eric Wilde — official chapter-by-chapter audio of the New Testament, streamed from the Church's CDN. Audio © Intellectual Reserve, Inc.; for personal study.
channel.description: Chapter-by-chapter audio of the New Testament, from the official Church CDN. Personal use only.

item.title: Title Page
item.description: New Testament — Title Page. Read aloud from the official audio recording of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.
item.itunes:subtitle: New Testament
item.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
